name: netbird
description: Manage NetBird resources declaratively using Pulumi's infrastructure-as-code framework.

url.description: URL to Netbird API, example: https://api.netbird.io

content.description: Record value: an IP address for A/AAAA or a hostname for CNAME.

type.description: Record type: A, AAAA, or CNAME.

masquerade.description: Whether to masquerade traffic through the router.

metric.description: Route metric; lower values have higher priority.

peer.description: Specific peer to use as router.

peerGroups.description: Peer groups to use as router peers.

description.description: Optional description for the subnet resource.

enabled.description: Whether the subnet resource is enabled.

groupIDs.description: Group IDs that have access to this subnet.

name.description: Display name for the subnet resource.

connected.description: Whether the peer is currently connected to the management server.

dnsLabel.description: The DNS label used to form the peer's FQDN.

groups.description: IDs of groups the peer belongs to.

hostname.description: The OS hostname of the machine.

ip.description: The WireGuard IP address assigned to the peer.

id.description: The unique identifier of the resource.

action.description: Action Policy rule accept or drops packets

authorizedGroups.description: Map of user group IDs to a list of local users for network access authorization

bidirectional.description: Bidirectional Define if the rule is applicable in both directions, sources, and destinations.

destinations.description: Destinations Policy rule destination group IDs

portRanges.description: PortRanges Policy rule affected ports ranges list

protocol.description: Protocol Policy rule type of the traffic

sources.description: Sources Policy rule source group IDs

action.description: Action Policy rule accept or drops packets

authorizedGroups.description: AuthorizedGroups Map of user group IDs to a list of local users

bidirectional.description: Bidirectional Define if the rule is applicable in both directions, sources, and destinations.

destinations.description: Destinations Policy rule destination group IDs

portRanges.description: PortRanges Policy rule affected ports ranges list

protocol.description: Protocol Policy rule type of the traffic

sources.description: Sources Policy rule source group IDs

nbVersionCheck.description: Posture check for the minimum NetBird client version.

osVersionCheck.description: Posture check for the minimum operating system version.

peerNetworkRangeCheck.description: Posture check based on peer local network addresses.

processCheck.description: Posture check for required binaries running on the peer.

enum.name: allow
enum.description: Allow peers from the specified locations.

enum.name: deny
enum.description: Deny peers from the specified locations.

action.description: Action to take upon geo location match (allow or deny).

locations.description: List of geo locations to which the check applies.

cityName.description: Commonly used English name of the city.

linux.description: Minimum kernel version check for Linux.

windows.description: Minimum kernel version check for Windows.

enum.name: allow
enum.description: Allow peers whose local network matches.

enum.name: deny
enum.description: Deny peers whose local network matches.

action.description: Action to take when the peer's network range matches (allow or deny).

ranges.description: List of CIDR network ranges to match against.

linuxPath.description: Path to the process executable on Linux.

macPath.description: Path to the process executable on macOS.

windowsPath.description: Path to the process executable on Windows.

processes.description: List of processes that must be running on the peer.

id.description: The unique identifier of the resource.

enum.name: custom
enum.description: A custom domain managed by the user.

enum.name: free
enum.description: A free managed domain provided by NetBird.

host.description: Backend IP or domain for this target.

path.description: URL path prefix for this target (HTTP only).

protocol.description: Protocol to use when connecting to the backend.

id.description: The unique identifier of the group.

enum.name: reusable
enum.description: Reusable setup key that supports multiple peers.

enum.name: one-off
enum.description: One-off setup key that can be used only once.

enum.name: Host
enum.description: A host resource (e.g., peer or device).

url.description: URL to Netbird API, example: https://api.netbird.io
URL to Netbird API, example: https://api.netbird.io

recordIds.description: IDs of the created DNSRecord resources, in declaration order.

zoneId.description: ID of the created DNSZone resource.

distributionGroups.description: Group IDs whose peers receive this DNS zone.

enableSearchDomain.description: Whether to enable the zone as a search domain for peers.

enabled.description: Whether the DNS zone is active.

name.description: Logical name for the DNS zone resource.

records.description: DNS records to create within the zone.

networkId.description: ID of the created Network resource.

routerId.description: ID of the created NetworkRouter resource.

subnetIds.description: IDs of the created NetworkResource (subnet) resources, in declaration order.

router.description: Router configuration attached to the network.

subnets.description: Subnet resources to attach to the network.

domains.description: Domains Match domain list. It should be empty only if primary is true.

groups.description: Groups Distribution group IDs that defines group of peers that will use this nameserver group

primary.description: Primary Defines if a nameserver group is primary that resolves all domains. It should be true only if domains list is empty.

searchDomainsEnabled.description: SearchDomainsEnabled Search domain status for match domains. It should be true only if domains list is not empty.

domains.description: Domains Match domain list. It should be empty only if primary is true.

groups.description: Groups Distribution group IDs that defines group of peers that will use this nameserver group

primary.description: Primary Defines if a nameserver group is primary that resolves all domains. It should be true only if domains list is empty.

searchDomainsEnabled.description: SearchDomainsEnabled Search domain status for match domains. It should be true only if domains list is not empty.

netbird:resource:DNSRecord.description: A DNS record within a NetBird DNS zone.

content.description: DNS record content (IP address for A/AAAA, domain for CNAME).

name.description: FQDN for the DNS record. Must be a subdomain within or match the zone's domain.

zoneID.description: ID of the DNS zone this record belongs to.

content.description: DNS record content (IP address for A/AAAA, domain for CNAME).

name.description: FQDN for the DNS record. Must be a subdomain within or match the zone's domain.

zoneID.description: ID of the DNS zone this record belongs to.

netbird:resource:DNSSettings.description: NetBird global DNS settings. This is a singleton resource — only one instance exists per account.

disabledManagementGroups.description: Group IDs whose DNS management is disabled.
Group IDs whose DNS management is disabled.

distributionGroups.description: Group IDs that define groups of peers that will resolve this zone.

enableSearchDomain.description: Enable this zone as a search domain.

distributionGroups.description: Group IDs that define groups of peers that will resolve this zone.

enableSearchDomain.description: Enable this zone as a search domain.

netbird:resource:Group.description: A NetBird group, which represents a collection of peers.

name.description: The name of the NetBird group.

peers.description: An optional list of peer IDs associated with this group.

resources.description: An optional list of resources to associate with this group.

name.description: The name of the NetBird group.

peers.description: An optional list of peer IDs to associate with this group.

resources.description: An optional list of resources to associate with this group.

description.description: An optional description of the network.

name.description: The name of the NetBird network.

description.description: An optional description of the network.

name.description: The name of the NetBird network.

netbird:resource:NetworkResource.description: A NetBird network resource, such as a CIDR range assigned to the network. Import ID format: <networkID>/<resourceID>.

address.description: CIDR or IP address block assigned to the resource.

groupIDs.description: List of group IDs associated with this resource.

networkID.description: ID of the network this resource belongs to.

address.description: CIDR or IP address block assigned to the resource.

groupIDs.description: List of group IDs associated with this resource.

networkID.description: ID of the network this resource belongs to.

netbird:resource:NetworkRouter.description: A NetBird network router resource. Import ID format: <networkID>/<routerID>.

networkID.description: ID of the network this router belongs to.

peer.description: Optional peer ID associated with this router.

peerGroups.description: Optional list of peer group IDs associated with this router.

networkID.description: ID of the network this router belongs to.

peer.description: Optional peer ID associated with this router.

peerGroups.description: Optional list of peer group IDs associated with this router.

netbird:resource:Peer.description: A NetBird peer representing a connected device.

approvalRequired.deprecationMessage: Cloud only, not maintained in this provider
Cloud only, not maintained in this provider

netbird:resource:Policy.description: A NetBird policy defining rules for communication between peers.

postureChecks.description: SourcePostureChecks Posture checks ID's applied to policy source groups, optional

rules.description: Rules Policy rule object for policy UI editor

postureChecks.description: SourcePostureChecks Posture checks ID's applied to policy source groups, optional

rules.description: Rules Policy rule object for policy UI editor

netbird:resource:PostureCheck.description: A NetBird posture check used to validate peer properties before granting policy access.

checks.description: List of checks to perform against peer properties.
List of checks to perform against peer properties.

netbird:resource:ReverseProxyDomain.description: A NetBird reverse proxy custom domain.

domain.description: Domain name for the reverse proxy.

requireSubdomain.description: Whether a subdomain label is required in front of this domain.

supportsCustomPorts.description: Whether the cluster supports binding arbitrary TCP/UDP ports.

targetCluster.description: The proxy cluster this domain is validated against.

type.description: Type of the reverse proxy domain (custom or free).

validated.description: Whether the domain has been validated.

domain.description: Domain name for the reverse proxy.

targetCluster.description: The proxy cluster this domain should be validated against.

accessGroups.description: NetBird group IDs whose peers may reach this private service over the tunnel. Required when private=true; ignored otherwise.

listenPort.description: Port the proxy listens on (L4/TLS only).

mode.description: Service mode: "http" for L7 reverse proxy, "tcp"/"udp"/"tls" for L4 passthrough.

passHostHeader.description: When true, the original client Host header is passed through to the backend.

private.description: When true, the service is NetBird-only: peers authenticate via WireGuard tunnel identity and an ACL policy is auto-generated from accessGroups. Requires mode=http. Mutually exclusive with SSO/bearer auth.

proxyCluster.description: The proxy cluster handling this service (derived from domain).

rewriteRedirects.description: When true, Location headers in backend responses are rewritten to the public-facing domain.

targets.description: List of target backends for this service.

accessGroups.description: NetBird group IDs whose peers may reach this private service over the tunnel. Required when private=true; ignored otherwise.

listenPort.description: Port the proxy listens on (L4/TLS only). Set to 0 for auto-assignment.

mode.description: Service mode: "http" for L7 reverse proxy, "tcp"/"udp"/"tls" for L4 passthrough.

passHostHeader.description: When true, the original client Host header is passed through to the backend.

private.description: When true, the service is NetBird-only: peers authenticate via WireGuard tunnel identity and an ACL policy is auto-generated from accessGroups. Requires mode=http. Mutually exclusive with SSO/bearer auth.

rewriteRedirects.description: When true, Location headers in backend responses are rewritten to the public-facing domain.

targets.description: List of target backends for this service.

netbird:resource:Route.description: A NetBird route resource for directing traffic through exit nodes or routing peers.

accessControlGroups.description: Access control group IDs associated with this route.

groups.description: Group IDs whose peers will use this route.

keepRoute.description: Keep the route after a domain no longer resolves to the IP.

masquerade.description: Whether masquerading is enabled for this route.

metric.description: Route metric; lower value means higher priority.

networkId.description: Route network identifier, used to group HA routes.

networkType.description: Network type (IPv4, IPv6, or domain) — computed by the API.

peer.description: Peer ID acting as the routing peer.

peerGroups.description: Peer group IDs acting as routing peers.

accessControlGroups.description: Access control group IDs associated with this route.

domains.description: Domain list for dynamic resolution (conflicts with network).

groups.description: Group IDs whose peers will use this route.

keepRoute.description: Keep the route after a domain no longer resolves to the IP.

masquerade.description: Whether masquerading is enabled for this route.

metric.description: Route metric; lower value means higher priority.

networkId.description: Route network identifier, used to group HA routes.

peer.description: Peer ID acting as the routing peer (conflicts with peerGroups).

peerGroups.description: Peer group IDs acting as routing peers (conflicts with peer).

allowExtraDnsLabels.description: Allow peers to add extra DNS labels beyond the base peer name.

autoGroups.description: Group IDs to auto-assign to peers created with this key.

ephemeral.description: Whether peers registered with this key are ephemeral (auto-expire).

expiresIn.description: Time-to-live in seconds from creation; use 0 for no expiration if supported by the API.

usageLimit.description: Maximum uses for reusable keys; 0 = unlimited.

allowExtraDnsLabels.description: Allow peers to add extra DNS labels beyond the base peer name.

autoGroups.description: Group IDs to auto-assign to peers created with this key.

ephemeral.description: Whether peers registered with this key are ephemeral (auto-expire).

expiresIn.description: Time-to-live in seconds from creation; use 0 for no expiration if supported by the API.

usageLimit.description: Maximum uses for reusable keys; 0 = unlimited.

netbird:resource:User.description: A NetBird user that receives an invite and is optionally assigned groups and roles.

autoGroups.description: Groups this user’s peers are automatically assigned to.

blocked.description: Indicates whether the user is blocked from accessing the system

isServiceUser.description: Whether this user is a service identity.

role.description: NetBird account role assigned to the user.

autoGroups.description: List of group IDs to auto-assign this user’s peers to.

blocked.description: Indicates whether the user is blocked from accessing the system. Used only on update, not create.

email.description: Email address to send user invite to.

isServiceUser.description: Whether this user is a service identity.

netbird:function:getPeers.description: List all NetBird peers, optionally filtered to those belonging to a specific group ID.

groupId.description: Optional group ID to filter peers. When set, only peers that belong to this group are returned.

peers.description: The list of peers matching the filter criteria.

netbird:function:lookupGroup.description: Look up an existing NetBird group by name and return its ID, peer list, and resource list.

name.description: The name of the group to look up.

peers.description: IDs of peers belonging to the group.

peersCount.description: Number of peers in the group.

resourcesCount.description: Number of resources in the group.

netbird:function:lookupPeer.description: Look up an existing NetBird peer by name and return its ID, IP address, and group memberships.

name.description: The name (hostname) of the peer to look up.

connected.description: Whether the peer is currently connected to the management server.

dnsLabel.description: The DNS label used to form the peer's FQDN.

groups.description: IDs of groups the peer belongs to.

hostname.description: The OS hostname of the machine.

ip.description: The WireGuard IP address assigned to the peer.

os.description: Operating system string reported by the peer.

netbird:function:lookupRoute.description: Look up an existing NetBird route by network CIDR and return its ID, routing peers, and configuration.

network.description: The network CIDR (e.g. '10.0.0.0/8') to look up. Returns the first matching route.

domains.description: Domain list for dynamic resolution (if this is a domain route).

groups.description: Group IDs that have access to this route.

masquerade.description: Whether the routing peer masquerades traffic to this prefix.

metric.description: Route metric; lower number means higher priority.

peer.description: The peer ID acting as the routing peer (mutually exclusive with peerGroups).

peerGroups.description: Group IDs whose peers act as routing peers (mutually exclusive with peer).

netbird:function:lookupSetupKey.description: Look up an existing NetBird setup key by name and return its metadata (not the secret key value).

name.description: The name of the setup key to look up.

autoGroups.description: Group IDs automatically assigned to peers that register with this key.

ephemeral.description: Whether peers registered with this key are ephemeral.

expires.description: Key expiration timestamp in RFC3339 format.

lastUsed.description: Timestamp of last key use in RFC3339 format.

revoked.description: Whether the setup key has been revoked.

usageLimit.description: Maximum number of times the key can be used (0 = unlimited for reusable).

netbird:function:lookupUser.description: Look up an existing NetBird user by email and return their ID, role, and auto-group assignments.

email.description: The email address of the user to look up.

autoGroups.description: Group IDs automatically assigned to peers registered by this user.

isBlocked.description: Whether the user is blocked from accessing the system.

role.description: The user's role in the NetBird account (e.g. admin, user).
